classes.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.get_vietnam_tz
documentation: Get Vietnam timezone object

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.get_current_datetime
documentation: Get current datetime in Vietnam timezone

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.get_current_date
documentation: Get current date in Vietnam timezone

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.get_current_datetime_str
documentation: Get current datetime as string

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.timestamp_to_datetime
documentation:
Convert timestamp to datetime object

Args:
    timestamp: Unix timestamp in milliseconds or seconds
    is_milliseconds: True if timestamp is in milliseconds, False if in seconds

Returns:
    datetime object in Vietnam timezone or None if timestamp is empty

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.timestamp_to_datetime_str
documentation: Convert timestamp to datetime string

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.format_to_dmy
documentation:
Convert datetime/date string to dd/mm/yyyy format

Args:
    datetime_str: Input datetime or date string
    
Returns:
    Date string in dd/mm/yyyy format (e.g., "31/12/2023") or None if input is empty
    
Raises:
    BaseError: If string cannot be formatted

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.get_days_ago_datetime
documentation: Get datetime object for specified days ago

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.get_days_ago_datetime_str
documentation: Get datetime string for specified days ago

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter.str_to_datetime
documentation:
Convert string to datetime object with automatic format detection

Handles various datetime string formats and converts them to datetime objects
with Vietnam timezone. Supports both date-first (dd-mm-yyyy) and 
year-first (yyyy-mm-dd) formats.

Args:
    datetime_str: Input datetime string (e.g., "2023-12-31 15:30:00" or "31-12-2023 15:30:00")
    
Returns:
    datetime object in Vietnam timezone or None if parsing fails

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter._normalize_datetime_format
documentation:
Standardize datetime string format

Converts various datetime string formats to a standard format:
- Replaces spaces with 'T' for ISO format
- Converts forward slashes to hyphens for consistent parsing

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter._add_timezone
documentation:
Add Vietnam timezone (+07:00) to datetime string if missing

Handles various cases:
- Strings ending with 'Z' (UTC)
- Strings without timezone
- Strings with existing timezone

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter._detect_date_format
documentation:
Detect whether date string is in year-first or day-first format

Attempts to parse the date string in both formats:
- yyyy-mm-dd (year first)
- dd-mm-yyyy (day first)

Returns:
    DateFormatOrder enum indicating detected format or None if format is invalid

methods.name: filum_utils.utils.datetime_formatter.DateTimeFormatter._parse_to_datetime
documentation:
Parse datetime string using detected format

Args:
    datetime_str: Normalized datetime string with timezone
    is_day_first: True if date is in dd-mm-yyyy format, False for yyyy-mm-dd
    
Returns:
    datetime object in Vietnam timezone or None if parsing fails
A class to handle datetime formatting operations with Vietnam timezone
